strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience exceeds 15-year minimum requirement
Demonstrates technical leadership through Staff roles and open source contributions
Current role involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP development work
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized expertise in AI—critical gap for AI Strategy role
No cloud platform architecture or strategy experience; role requires cloud/AI platform fluency and advising customers
Career shows technical builder, not strategic director-level leader; no evidence of organizational strategy influence or customer advisory

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI product/platform expertise or recognition
Lacks cloud platform strategy and architecture experience
Seniority mismatch: technical contributor vs. director-level strategic IC

response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience minimum, they lack the core qualifications for this director-level AI strategy role. Their resume demonstrates no AI products shipped, recognized AI expertise, or thought leadership in AI—a stated preference and critical gap. Additionally, there is no evidence of cloud platform strategy, architecture, or experience advising customers on cloud adoption despite the role's emphasis on these areas. The candidate's background is that of a capable full-stack technical builder with breadth across technologies, but this role requires strategic director-level leadership, demonstrated AI expertise, and proven cloud platform experience.
